title: [Cobblemon] Rain Worldmon
description: A Rain World inspired datapack for Cobblemon.
body:
Rain Worldmon

Includes 8 different obtainable slugcats from Rain World and Downpour DLC. This pack couldn't have been made possible without the help of Gingledoof and Dusken!

Installation

Make sure you have Cobblemon installed Place ``Rain Worldmon.zip`` in your resource packs folder. > For server installations, make sure to copy this to your world's **datapacks** folder.
